# What Not to Do Before Filing Bankruptcy [2026]
> Avoid these critical mistakes before filing bankruptcy. Transfers, credit card charges, retirement withdrawals, and other red flags. ...

## About
whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com is part of the Open Bankruptcy Project (openbankruptcyproject.org), a 501(c)(3) nonprofit building free, open-source tools for bankruptcy court transparency.

## Key Pages
- Do Not Cash Out Retirement Before Bankruptcy: https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-cash-out-retirement.html
- Do Not Hide Income Before or During Bankruptcy: https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-hide-income.html
- Do Not Pay Family Members Before Filing Bankruptcy: https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-pay-family-first.html
- Do Not Run Up Credit Cards Before Bankruptcy: https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-run-up-credit.html
- Do Not Sell Property Below Value Before Bankruptcy: https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-sell-property.html
- Do Not Transfer Assets Before Bankruptcy: https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-transfer-assets.html
- Do Not Wait Too Long to File Bankruptcy: https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/dont-wait-too-long.html
- Pre-Filing Bankruptcy FAQ -- What to Avoid: https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/faq.html
- What Not to Do Before Filing Bankruptcy: https://whatnottobeforebankruptcy.com/

## Contact
- Website: https://openbankruptcyproject.org
- Email: contact@openbankruptcyproject.org
- GitHub: https://github.com/openbankruptcyproject

## License
Content is provided for educational purposes. Data sourced from the Federal Judicial Center Integrated Database (4.9M cases, 94 districts).
